steps.title: Find the yearly multiplier
steps.content: A yearly decrease of $2.5\%$ means the population keeps $100\%-2.5\%=97.5\%$ of the previous year's value. As a decimal, the multiplier is $0.975$.

steps.title: Count the years
steps.content: From 2008 to 2018 is $10$ years, so the multiplier is applied $10$ times.

steps.title: Build the expression
steps.content: Starting from $7.84$ quail per mile, the 2018 estimate is $7.84(0.975)^{10}$. This matches choice D.
